ns0:entry.ns0:title: ONLYOFFICE/DocumentServer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ONLYOFFICE/DocumentServer
Language: shell
ONLYOFFICE Docs is a free collaborative online office suite comprising viewers and editors for texts, spreadsheets and presentations, forms and PDF, fully compatible with Office Open XML formats: .docx, .xlsx, .pptx and enabling collaborative editing in real time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: acmesh-official/acme.sh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/acmesh-official/acme.sh
Language: shell
A pure Unix shell script ACME client for SSL / TLS certificate automation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: assafdori/bypass-mdm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/assafdori/bypass-mdm
Language: shell
Bypass MDM Setup for MacOS, up to MacOS Tahoe 26.3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: awesome-jellyfin/awesome-jellyfin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/awesome-jellyfin/awesome-jellyfin
Language: shell
A Collection of Awesome Jellyfin Plugins, Themes, Guides and More!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bin456789/reinstall
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bin456789/reinstall
Language: shell
一键DD/重装脚本 (One-click reinstall OS on VPS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eugr/spark-vllm-docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eugr/spark-vllm-docker
Language: shell
Docker configuration for running VLLM on dual DGX Sparks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: frankbria/ralph-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/frankbria/ralph-claude-code
Language: shell
Autonomous AI development loop for Claude Code with intelligent exit detection

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mbadolato/iTerm2-Color-Schemes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mbadolato/iTerm2-Color-Schemes
Language: shell
Over 450 terminal color schemes/themes for iTerm/iTerm2. Includes ports to Terminal, Konsole, PuTTY, Xresources, XRDB, Remmina, Termite, XFCE, Tilda, FreeBSD VT, Terminator, Kitty, MobaXterm, LXTerminal, Microsoft's Windows Terminal, Visual Studio, Alacritty, Ghostty, and many more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/obra/superpowers
Language: shell
An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yuaotian/go-cursor-help
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yuaotian/go-cursor-help
Language: shell
解决Cursor在免费订阅期间出现以下提示的问题: Your request has been blocked as our system has detected suspicious activity / You've reached your trial request limit. / Too many free trial accounts used on this machine.
